name: riak
explanation: Riak's HTTP REST API exposes a singular, well-known stats endpoint at `/stats` on the default HTTP port 8098. The shipped auto_conf.yaml templates `url: http://%%host%%:8098/stats` and the check simply GETs that URL and parses the JSON. No authentication is required by default, and there is only one canonical path. Pattern B (single canonical HTTP path).
notes: Riak also exposes a separate protobuf port (8087); the Datadog check consumes only the HTTP `/stats` JSON endpoint, so a single HTTP path probe suffices.
